mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workflows (id, project_id, name, description, status, nodes_json, edges_json, config_json, is_default, version, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{id, typeHandler=com.runnershigh.tps.adapter.out.persistence.typehandler.UuidTypeHandler}, #{projectId, typeHandler=com.runnershigh.tps.adapter.out.persistence.typehandler.UuidTypeHandler}, #{name}, #{description}, #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{nodesJson}::jsonb, #{edgesJson}::jsonb, #{configJson}::jsonb, #{isDefault}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE workflows SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, status = #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, nodes_json = #{nodesJson}::jsonb, edges_json = #{edgesJson}::jsonb, config_json = #{configJson}::jsonb, is_default = #{isDefault}, version = #{version}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.runnershigh.tps.adapter.out.persistence.typehandler.UuidTypeHandler}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM workflows WHERE project_id = #{projectId, typeHandler=com.runnershigh.tps.adapter.out.persistence.typehandler.UuidTypeHandler} AND is_default = true LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE workflows SET is_default = false WHERE project_id = #{projectId, typeHandler=com.runnershigh.tps.adapter.out.persistence.typehandler.UuidTypeHandler}
